title: Flowchart Operation Analysis
description: Schema for analysis of flowchart operations detected in lecture videos.

reasoning_process.description: Agentic pipeline's intermediate reasoning trace stored as a raw string. Null when no reasoning steps were recorded, or absent in basic pipeline.

DocumentMetadata.description: Top-level metadata about the analysis run.

frame_rate.description: Frame rate (fps) at which the video was sampled before being sent to the model. Provenance only — operations reference timestamps, not frame numbers.

model.description: LLM model identifier used for analysis.

analysis_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the analysis was produced.

reasoning_steps.description: Number of agentic reasoning steps executed. Present only in agentic analyses.

Analysis.description: The core analysis output containing detected operations and summary.

operations.description: Chronologically ordered list of detected flowchart operations.

AnalysisMetadata.description: Metadata about the analysis results themselves.

video_duration.description: Total duration of the analyzed video segment in MM:SS format.

total_operations_detected.description: Total number of operations detected in the video.

visibility_issues.description: Description of visibility problems encountered (e.g., glare, occlusion, low resolution). Null when no issues.

ConfidenceLevel.description: Confidence level for a classification or analysis.

OperationType.description: The five-class taxonomy for flowchart operations. CREATION: initial drawing on blank surface. ADDITION: new content added to existing flowchart. HIGHLIGHTING: annotation/emphasis on existing elements. ERASURE: partial removal of flowchart elements. COMPLETE_ERASURE: full removal of entire flowchart.

Operation.description: A single detected flowchart operation with temporal bounds, classification, and evidence.

operation_id.description: Sequential identifier for the operation within this analysis.

timestamp_start.description: Start timestamp in MM:SS or MM:SS.mmm format.

timestamp_end.description: End timestamp in MM:SS or MM:SS.mmm format.

PhysicalAction.description: What the instructor physically did during this operation.

description.description: Natural language description of the physical drawing/erasing action.

criteria_met.description: Taxonomy criteria that were satisfied to justify the classification.

distinguishing_features.description: Key features that distinguish this operation from similar types.

edge_cases_considered.description: Ambiguities or edge cases the model considered during classification.

ContentDescription.description: Semantic description of what was drawn, added, or removed.

semantic_content.description: High-level summary of the content's meaning.

diagram_elements.description: List of specific diagram elements involved (nodes, arrows, labels, shapes). May be empty for erasure operations.

pedagogical_context.description: How this operation fits into the lecture's teaching flow.

VisualEvidence.description: Before/after visual state and optional frame references.

before_state.description: Description of the visual state before the operation.

after_state.description: Description of the visual state after the operation.

frame_references.description: Specific frame timestamps referenced as evidence. Optional — not all analyses produce this.

start.description: Timestamp of the evidence start frame.

end.description: Timestamp of the evidence end frame.

Summary.description: Aggregate counts and qualitative observations for the full analysis.

creation_count.description: Must equal the number of operations with operation_type CREATION.

addition_count.description: Must equal the number of operations with operation_type ADDITION.

highlighting_count.description: Must equal the number of operations with operation_type HIGHLIGHTING.

erasure_count.description: Must equal the number of operations with operation_type ERASURE.

complete_erasure_count.description: Must equal the number of operations with operation_type COMPLETE_ERASURE.

key_observations.description: Notable patterns or behaviors observed across the video.

challenges_encountered.description: Ambiguities or difficulties the model faced during analysis.
